chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-7403 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.31389/2022. 2. For orders on Misc. No.31390/2022. 3. For orders on Misc. No.31391/2022. 4. For hearing of Main Case. 05.12.2022. Ms. Aliya Malik, Advocate for the Petitioner. -------- YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J. - The Petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, impugning the Order dated 27.10.2022 made by the learned District Judge, Malir, Karachi, dismissing Civil Revision Application No.60/2022 filed by the Petitioner against the Order passed by the learned 1st Senior Civil Judge, Malir, Karachi, on 22.09.2022 whereby the Court proceeded to frame Issues on an Application under Section 12 CPC filed in Civil Suit No.568/2018. Under the given circumstances, where the underlying Application under Section 12 CPC remains pending, we are of the view that the instant Petition is misconceived, hence, while granting the application for urgency, we hereby dismiss the same in limine, along with the other miscellaneous applications. JUDGE CHIEF JUSTICE MUBASHIR
